title: Google Bans Coding With Its Biggest Attack On Devs Ever: AntiGravity 2.0
summary: Google upgraded Antigravity from a code editor to an AI agent control tower, forcing developers to migrate from the old workflow. The system uses Gemini 3.5 Flash to enable AI agents to build, test, and manage code in parallel, marking a shift toward agent-based software development.
